steps.title: Recognize exponential growth model
steps.content:
When a quantity doubles every fixed time interval, its value after time t is modeled by $$M(t)=M_0 \cdot 2^{t/T}$$ where $M_0$ is the initial amount and $T$ is the doubling period.
Here $M_0=890$ dollars and $T=10$ years.

steps.title: Substitute the given values
steps.content:
Substituting $M_0=890$ and $T=10$ gives $$M(t)=890 \cdot 2^{t/10}$$
This expression matches choice C — C is correct.
